description: A customer's car won't start, and they suspect a dead battery.

nodes.task_description: Identify the customer and their location.

expected_outcome.value: Agent verifies the customer and gets their location.

nodes.task_description: Run a remote diagnostic to check the battery voltage.

expected_outcome.value: The diagnostic shows the battery voltage is 9.5V, confirming it is discharged.

nodes.task_description: Dispatch a service provider to perform a jump start and provide an ETA.

expected_outcome.value: Agent dispatches help for a jump start and gives a 30-minute ETA.
